scenario_name: Scenario 13 — Async Implementation with Error Propagation
justification: All pass criteria met: sequential async calls (fraud before gateway, two separate try/catch blocks), AC6 explicitly tested with expect(gateway.charge).not.toHaveBeenCalled(), AC4/AC5 chain original error via PaymentError.cause property, AC3 preserves decline reason from gateway, all 6 ACs tested with mock services (12 tests total), and acceptance_criteria_coverage maps all 6 ACs in a detailed table.

observations.text: AC2 and AC6 tested together in a combined describe block, verifying both the error throw and that gateway was never called
Error chaining uses a dedicated cause property on PaymentError rather than swallowing errors
Call ordering verified with an explicit ordering-guarantee test, not just implicit sequencing
AC4 also verifies gateway was not called after fraud service network error — defense in depth
No Promise.all usage; sequential flow enforced structurally via two separate try/catch blocks
AC3 includes a default-message fallback test, going beyond minimum requirements
